text: just get them a Xbox 360 with the Xbox 360 Kinect and get Kinect adventures
text_zh: 直接给他们整个 Xbox 360 配 Kinect 和 Kinect adventures 就行了

text: Did you guys have problems with setting up the nex playground
text_zh: 你们设置 nex playground 的时候遇到什么问题了吗？

text: what do games cost? does it come with all of those games?
text_zh: 游戏多少钱？这些游戏都包含在里面吗？

text: This wont replace my WII Fit
text_zh: 这代替不了我的 WII Fit

text: do you have to pay for a monthly subscription for this or pay for each game?
text_zh: 这个需要按月付费还是按游戏付费？

text: can we see the sports games
So it’s the new fruit ninja?
text_zh: 所以这是新的水果忍者吗？

text: How does this compare to a switch im looking for a video game my 4 year old can play.
text_zh: 这个跟 Switch 怎么比？我正在找一个我 4 岁的孩子能玩的游戏。
